summary: Tested Price Integrity Service P1 bug fix. All backend APIs working correctly. Dead tickers (ZI, TWTR, SIVB) properly flagged and excluded from scan results. Frontend access gate, Auto Trade, Live Prices, and Investments pages all working.

backend_tests.price_integrity_zi: PASS - ZI correctly flagged as dead_ticker=true (source: dead_ticker(last_trade=2025-05-12))
backend_tests.price_integrity_mrvl: PASS - MRVL healthy with price $87.84, stale=false
backend_tests.price_integrity_batch_dead: PASS - ZI, TWTR, SIVB all flagged as dead (3/3 dead)
backend_tests.price_integrity_batch_healthy: PASS - AAPL, MSFT healthy (0 dead, 2 healthy)
backend_tests.auto_trade_scan: PASS - No dead tickers in scan results
backend_tests.investments_scan: PASS - No dead tickers in results (1075 stocks, 0 dead)

frontend_tests.access_gate: PASS - Login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 works
frontend_tests.dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with Hot Trading Signals and Top Investment Ideas
frontend_tests.auto_trade_page: PASS - Auto Trade page loads without React errors, shows scheduler status
frontend_tests.live_prices_tab: PASS - Tab clickable, shows LIVE WS badge, price table with 30 symbols
frontend_tests.investments_page: PASS - Shows 1250 stocks analyzed, no dead tickers visible

api_verification./api/auth/access: PASS - Returns token with valid code
api_verification./api/auto-trade/scan: PASS - No dead tickers in results
api_verification./api/investments/scan: PASS - No dead tickers in results

critical_code_review_comments: Price Integrity Service correctly validates freshness and flags dead tickers
scan_opportunities in ai_trading_system.py correctly filters dead_ticker!=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Price Integrity Service P1 bug fix verified. 175 dead tickers flagged. Key dead tickers: ZI (ZoomInfo->GTM), TWTR (Twitter->X), SIVB (Silicon Valley Bank). All scan endpoints filter dead_ticker!=true. Diagnostics endpoint at /api/debug/price_integrity works for single and batch checks.
features_verified: GET /api/auto-trade/scan does NOT contain dead ticker symbols
GET /api/investments/scan does NOT show dead ticker symbols
Frontend access gate with Bullishalmarkhan7.7 works
Auto Trade page loads without React errors
Investments page loads and shows stocks (no dead tickers visible)
Live Prices tab works (start feed, see prices)
GET /api/live-prices/status/engine shows mode and running status
